ayat: Allah does not burden a soul beyond what it can bear.
Do not lose heart nor fall into despair, for you will be superior if you are true believers.
And whoever puts their trust in Allah, then He will suffice them.
The believers are those whose hearts tremble when Allah is mentioned.
Nothing will happen to us except what Allah has decreed for us.
Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs.
And those who strive for Us – We will surely guide them to Our ways.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
Put your trust in Allah if you are believers.
Is Allah not sufficient for His servant?
O you who believe, seek help through patience and prayer.
Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
O you who believe, persevere and endure.
We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger.
Be patient, and your patience is only through Allah.
And be patient, for Allah does not allow the reward of the righteous to be lost.
Be patient over what befalls you.
Indeed, whoever fears Allah and is patient — Allah does not allow the reward of the good to be lost.
Seek help through patience and prayer.
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.
My mercy encompasses all things.
Your Lord has decreed mercy upon Himself.
Your Lord will give you, and you will be satisfied.
No one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.
Who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except those who are astray?
Call upon Me; I will respond to you.
I respond to the call of the caller when he calls upon Me.
He sends down rain after people had despaired.
If you tried to count Allah’s favors, you could never enumerate them.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you.
Remember Me, and I will remember you.
Whoever is grateful is only grateful for the benefit of himself.
Be grateful for the favor of Allah.
Few of My servants are truly grateful.
Eat of the good things We have provided you and be grateful.
Whether he be grateful or ungrateful.
That you may seek of His bounty and be grateful.
So that you may be grateful.
What would Allah do with your punishment if you are grateful and believe?
I did not create jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
He created death and life to test which of you is best in deeds.
I will place upon the earth a successor.
A person will have only what they strive for.
Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is within themselves.
Let arise among you a group inviting to goodness.
Work, for Allah will see your deeds.
Let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow.
Whoever does righteousness… We will give them a good life.
For men is what they earn and for women is what they earn.
Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth.
This is the Book in which there is no doubt, a guidance for the righteous.
This Qur’an guides to that which is most upright.
Allah guides those who seek His pleasure to the ways of peace.
Those who listen to speech and follow the best of it.
Our Lord, grant us mercy from Yourself and guide us rightly.
Guide us to the straight path.
The Qur’an was revealed as guidance for mankind.
This is My straight path, so follow it.
Those whose hearts Allah has opened to Islam.
Indeed, Allah commands justice, good conduct, and giving.
The most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous.
Repel evil with what is better.
The servants of the Most Merciful walk upon the earth humbly.
Let them pardon and overlook.
Those who restrain anger and pardon people.
Be good to parents, relatives, and neighbors.
Do not turn your cheek away from people in pride.
Let not a people ridicule another people.
Your Lord has decreed that you worship none but Him and be good to parents.
They reflect upon the creation of the heavens and the earth.
You do not see any flaw in the creation of the Most Merciful.
In that are signs for people who reflect.
He created for you spouses that you may find tranquility in them.
When He intends a thing, He only says ‘Be’, and it is.
My prayer, sacrifice, life and death are for Allah.
If We had sent down this Qur’an upon a mountain…
We will show them Our signs in the horizons.
A healing for what is in the hearts.
A blessed Book so that they may reflect upon its verses.
Peace be upon you for what you patiently endured.
Allah has promised the believing men and women gardens.
Rest and provision and a garden of pleasure.
No soul knows what joy is kept hidden for them.
Their reward is with their Lord.
I will not allow the work of any worker among you to be lost.
Whoever does righteous deeds… will enter Paradise.
Peace — a word from a Merciful Lord.
Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without measure.
Their light will run before them.
So which of the favors of your Lord will you deny?
Your Lord has not forsaken you.
The Hereafter is better for you than the first life.
Say: He is Allah, the One.
Allah, the Eternal Refuge.
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the dawn.
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.
When the help of Allah and victory comes.
Indeed, We have given you a clear victory.
Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.
If Allah helps you, none can overcome you.
Victory is only from Allah.
Whoever fears Allah – He will make for him a way out.
Allah is the ally of those who believe.
Allah is sufficient for me; there is no deity except Him.
He sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers.
He is Allah, besides whom there is no deity.
Allah – there is no deity except Him.
He is with you wherever you are.
Allah is gentle with His servants.
How many a small group has overcome a large group by permission of Allah.
Be patient; indeed Allah is with the patient.
What is with Allah is better and lasting.
Allah loves those who are steadfast.
We will surely test you.
Give good tidings to the patient.
Allah will reinforce you with angels.
Indeed, the help of Allah is near.
They will be given their reward twice for their patience.
He rewarded them for their patience with Paradise.
Whoever does wrong then seeks forgiveness will find Allah forgiving.
Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves.
Who forgives sins except Allah?
Allah will replace their evil deeds with good.
Turn to your Lord and submit to Him.
Turn to Allah in sincere repentance.
Seek forgiveness of your Lord.
Turn to Allah in repentance.
Allah will turn to him in forgiveness.
Seek forgiveness of Allah.
Is the reward for good anything but good?
The example of those who spend in the way of Allah is like a seed.
He gave you of all that you asked.
In the bounty of Allah and His mercy let them rejoice.
Seek the Hereafter through what Allah has given you.
Whatever good you spend is for yourselves.
That you may seek His bounty.
Whoever does a good deed We increase it in goodness.
You will not attain righteousness until you spend.
Whatever blessing you have is from Allah.
Whoever brings a good deed shall have ten like it.
Then he will be recompensed for it fully.
Whoever does an atom’s weight of good will see it.
And whoever does an atom’s weight of evil will see it.
Walk among its slopes and eat of His provision.
Disperse through the land and seek Allah’s bounty.
The best one you can hire is the strong and trustworthy.
If you do good, you do good for yourselves.
For all there are degrees according to what they did.
They will have a share of what they earned.
Indeed in the heavens and the earth are signs.
Among His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth.
Look at its fruit when it yields.
Do they not look into the realm of the heavens and earth?
He produces crops for you.
He subjected the sea for you.
It is not the eyes that are blind, but the hearts.
Travel through the land and observe.
Do you not see that Allah sends down rain?
Among His signs is lightning.
The believers are but brothers.
Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom.
Those who are moderate in spending.
Lower your voice.
Avoid much suspicion.
Tell the believing men to lower their gaze.
Tell the believing women to lower their gaze.
Render trusts to whom they are due.
Speak kindly to people.
Be gentle with them.
Those who believe and do good deeds – joy is for them.
We will not allow the reward of the righteous to be lost.
Give glad tidings to those who believe.
We will admit them into gardens.
For those who do good is the best reward.
They will have whatever they wish.
There will circulate among them plates of gold.
The righteous will be in gardens and springs.
The foremost are the foremost.
Indeed the righteous will be in pleasure.
He neither begets nor is born.
And there is none comparable to Him.
The Face of your Lord will remain.
Everything will perish except His Face.
He is the First and the Last.
He is Allah, the Creator.
Allah guides to His light whom He wills.
Who remembers the name of his Lord and prays.
Read in the name of your Lord who created.
He taught man what he did not know.
Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.
Help from Allah and near victory.
Allah is aware of what you do.
Even if it were the weight of a mustard seed.
Whoever submits to Allah and does good.
Indeed the friends of Allah will have no fear.
Do not fear nor grieve.
O tranquil soul.
Return to your Lord, pleased and pleasing.
If they incline to peace, then incline to it also and rely upon Allah.
Whatever you have been given is only for the enjoyment of worldly life, but what is with Allah is better and lasting.
No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah.
To Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth.
You give sovereignty to whom You will and take sovereignty from whom You will.
If Allah touches you with harm, none can remove it but Him.
If Allah touches you with harm, none can remove it except Him.
Say: Allah is sufficient for me.
And say: Praise be to Allah.
How many creatures do not carry their provision; Allah provides for them and for you.
The righteous are those who are patient in poverty and hardship.
You will surely be tested in your wealth and yourselves.
If there are twenty steadfast among you, they will overcome two hundred.
Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
If you are patient – it is better for those who are patient.
Be patient with those who call upon their Lord.
We test you with evil and good as trial.
Indeed I rewarded them today for their patience.
Allah has prepared forgiveness and a great reward.
Allah will deliver those who feared Him.
Indeed the mercy of Allah is near to the doers of good.
Show forgiveness and enjoin what is good.
No blame will there be upon you today.
But whoever forgives and reconciles – his reward is with Allah.
If you disclose good or conceal it, Allah is ever forgiving.
Allah is severe in punishment and forgiving and merciful.
Allah may remove from you your misdeeds.
Allah made for you spouses and children.
Be grateful to Me and to your parents.
Eat from the provision of your Lord and be grateful.
He created livestock for you.
He sends down rain from the sky.
Good land produces vegetation by permission of its Lord.
Allah created the heavens and the earth.
He made the earth a bed for you.
It is Allah who made the earth a resting place.
To your Lord is the final destination.
You are laboring toward your Lord.
No bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another.
Every soul is held in pledge for what it earned.
Whoever does righteousness – it is for himself.
Whoever desires the Hereafter and strives for it.
No soul can ever die except by Allah’s permission.
Know that worldly life is but amusement.
He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself.
He has succeeded who purifies it.
In the creation of the heavens and earth are signs.
Indeed in the creation of the heavens and earth are signs.
And what He has created for you on earth.
Who created the heavens and the earth?
He created the heavens without pillars.
Only those fear Allah who have knowledge.
The creation of the heavens and earth is greater.
Have they not looked at the sky above them?
On the earth are signs for those with certainty.
And in yourselves – will you not see?
Do good; indeed Allah loves the doers of good.
Race toward forgiveness from your Lord.
Cooperate in righteousness and piety.
The believing men and women are allies of one another.
Bow and prostrate and worship your Lord.
Men whom neither trade nor sale distract from remembrance of Allah.
Whoever does righteousness – it is for himself.
Allah appreciates the good deeds.
So fear Allah as much as you are able.
For those who fear Allah are gardens.
Gardens of perpetual residence.
Gardens of Eden which they enter.
Those who believe will have gardens.
They will be rewarded with the highest place.
As for those who believed and did righteous deeds.
Enter Paradise, you and your spouses.
Enter it in peace.
Indeed the righteous will be in gardens.
So Allah will protect them.
We will ease you toward ease.
As for the favor of your Lord, proclaim it.
Blessed is the name of your Lord.
He is Allah, besides whom there is no deity.
The heavens and the earth glorify Him.
We are closer to him than his jugular vein.
He is the Forgiving, the Loving.
We have made the Qur’an easy to remember.
So remind; you are only a reminder.
So when you have finished, then stand up for worship.
And to your Lord direct your longing.
My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance.
There is no deity except You; glory be to You.
My Lord, forgive and have mercy.
Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort.
Our Lord, give us good in this world.
Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate.
Our Lord, we have believed.
Our Lord, pour upon us patience.
Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us.
Those are the party of Allah – surely the party of Allah are the successful.
Among your spouses and children are enemies to you, so beware of them.
That is Allah, your Lord; there is no deity except Him.
What Allah grants of mercy none can withhold.
Indeed prayer prevents immorality and wrongdoing.
To Allah belongs the command entirely.
Seek help through Allah and be patient.
Honor belongs entirely to Allah.
We made what is on earth an adornment for it to test them.
So be patient; the end is for the righteous.
Our Lord, pour upon us patience.
We made from them leaders guiding by Our command.
We will surely be patient over what you harm us with.
If you are patient and fear Allah, their plot will not harm you.
We have made some of you as a trial for others.
Command your family to pray and be steadfast.
He has decreed mercy upon Himself.
Allah accepts the repentance of those who do evil in ignorance.
Except those who repent and correct themselves.
Except for those who repent after that.
He accepts repentance from His servants.
He will grant you a light by which you walk.
Except those who repent after that and correct themselves.
They would have found Allah accepting of repentance.
Whoever repents and does righteousness.
He has completed His favors upon you.
He gave you hearing, sight, and hearts.
He has raised some of you above others.
We have distributed among them their livelihood.
We created livestock for them.
And We subdued them for them.
Let man look at his food.
We poured down water abundantly.
For all there are degrees according to what they did.
So that every soul may be rewarded.
Did you think We created you uselessly?
He produced you and made for you hearing.
So that every soul may be recompensed.
Allah increases those who are guided.
To Him ascends good speech.
Today every soul will be recompensed.
Does man think he will be left neglected?
You will surely travel from stage to stage.
Among His signs is that He created you from dust.
Among His signs is your sleep by night and day.
Among His signs is the sky and earth standing by His command.
He causes the night to enter the day.
Allah takes the souls at the time of death.
Do they not see the birds above them?
Do they not look at the camels – how they are created?
And at the sky – how it is raised?
And at the mountains – how they are set up?
So compete in good deeds.
Make peace between them.
Establish prayer and command what is right.
But those who fear their Lord will have gardens.
Allah has purchased from the believers their lives.
They will have gardens of Eden.
Allah will admit those who believe into gardens.
They will have chambers above them.
O My servants, there will be no fear upon you today.
We will join them with their descendants.
In gardens of pleasure.
The righteous will drink from a cup.
Indeed the record of the righteous is in ‘Illiyyin.
Everyone upon the earth will perish.
He is Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure.
Our Lord, accept from us.
Our Lord, make us Muslims in submission to You.
Our Lord, You did not create this in vain.
You are our protector.
In Allah we rely.
My Lord, expand for me my chest.
So they may understand my speech.
Our Lord, we have believed.
Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell.
Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith.
